benefits.name: Ability Score Increase
benefits.description: Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 30.

benefits.name: Twist of Fate
benefits.description: When you or another creature within 60 feet of you makes a D20 Test, you can use your Reaction to cause the creature to reroll, and the creature must use the new roll. Once you use this Reaction, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.
